full_text:
Lady Xi
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Xiwas born in Nan. Separated from her husband, she looked after children on her own. Rewarded by Cao Pi. Lady Xi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
